text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 Chinese workers at a Rosneft refinery in Komsomolsk-on-Amur, Russia’s Far East, have gone on strike over unpaid wages, holding signs reading “Putin, help us.” ▪️ The protest is taking place under police supervision, with no detentions or fines reported so far. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇨🇳 🇷🇺 俄罗斯远东地区阿穆尔河畔共青城的俄罗斯石油公司炼油厂的中国工人因被拖欠工资举行罢工，他们手持写有“普京，帮帮我们”的标语。▪️ 抗议活动在警方监督下进行，目前尚未有拘留或罚款的报道。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 Five parties are participating in Hungary’s parliamentary elections, but the main contest is between the opposition Tisza and the ruling Fidesz. ▪️ Voter turnout is relatively high, with queues already forming at some polling stations in Budapest. ▪️ Final vote counting is expected to be completed no later than April 18. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举有五个政党参加，但主要的竞争是在反对党“蒂萨党”（Tisza）和执政党“青民盟”（Fidesz）之间展开。▪️ 选民投票率相对较高，布达佩斯的一些投票站已经排起了长队。▪️ 最终计票预计不迟于4月18日完成。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Ukraine will open the "Druzhba" oil pipeline immediately after the elections in Hungary, Orban believes. "We will win the elections and the next morning, the Ukrainians will open it," he told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 欧尔班认为，乌克兰将在匈牙利选举后立即开放“友谊”输油管道。“我们将赢得选举，第二天早上，乌克兰人就会开放它，”他告诉俄新社。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Saudi Arabia's east-west oil pipeline, which bypasses the Strait of Hormuz, is again functioning at full capacity of 7 million barrels a day. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 沙特阿拉伯绕过霍尔木兹海峡的东西向输油管道再次以每天700万桶的满负荷运转。推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine’s General Staff says Russia racked up 2,299 ceasefire violations from 4 pm to 7 am, including 28 assaults, 479 shelling incidents and 1,792 Lancet, Molniya and FPV strikes. No missiles, glide bombs or Shaheds. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 An hour after the truce began, Russian propagandists predictably claim "Ukraine broke it by hitting Nova Kakhovka." https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部称，俄罗斯在下午4点至早上7点期间累计违反停火协议2,299次，包括28次突袭、479次炮击和1,792次“柳叶刀”、“闪电”及FPV无人机袭击。没有导弹、滑翔炸弹或“沙赫德”无人机。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 停火开始一小时后，俄罗斯宣传人员不出所料地声称“乌克兰通过袭击新卡霍夫卡破坏了停火”。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan sends 13,000 troops and 10 to 18 fighter jets, along with support aircraft to King Abdulaziz Air Base, Saudi Arabia - Saudi MOD tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦向沙特阿拉伯阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地派遣了13,000名士兵和10至18架战斗机，以及支援飞机 - 沙特国防部推文

text: Open Source Intel NYT Report: Iran’s parliament Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf met face to face with Vice President JD Vance and shook hands during the talks. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《纽约时报》报道：伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在会谈期间与副总统JD·万斯面对面会晤并握手。推文

text: WarTranslated Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 3.46% by 7 AM, a record and nearly double the same hour four years ago. The main race is Fidesz vs Tisza with Peter Magyar leading in polls, a pivotal vote for Hungary and for Orban. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利议会选举截至早上7点的投票率为3.46%，创下历史新高，几乎是四年前同一时间的双倍。主要的竞争是青民盟对阵蒂萨党，彼得·马扎尔在民调中领先，这对匈牙利和欧尔班来说是一次关键的投票。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 匈牙利议会选举已经开始。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Kyiv says Russia committed 2,299 violations of the Easter ceasefire, while Moscow claims Ukraine violated it 1,971 times.
text_zh: 基辅称俄罗斯违反复活节停火协议2,299次，而莫斯科声称乌克兰违反了1,971次。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 At least 30 people died in a stampede at Haiti’s Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot after a gathering promoted on TikTok, which drew a large crowd including school-age children as young as 12. Heavy rain reportedly triggered panic during the event. Officials say most of the victims died from asphyxiation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 海地米洛的拉费里埃城堡发生踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡。此前TikTok上的一场聚会吸引了大量人群，其中包括年仅12岁的学龄儿童。据报道，大雨在活动期间引发了恐慌。官员称大多数受害者死于窒息。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel At least 30 people, many of them school-age children as young as 12, were killed in a stampede at the Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot, Haiti, after heavy rains triggered panic at a gathering advertised on TikTok, the Miami Herald reports, citing local officials. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据《迈阿密先驱报》援引当地官员的话报道，在海地米洛的拉费里埃城堡，一场在TikTok上宣传的聚会因大雨引发恐慌，导致至少30人死亡，其中许多是年仅12岁的学龄儿童。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump after talks with Iran breakdown: “The trump card president holds if Iran won’t bend: a navel blockade” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043222148664250630/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统在与伊朗的会谈破裂后表示：“如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中的王牌是：海军封锁” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043222148664250630/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 👊 🇮🇷 Donald Trump has proposed a naval blockade against Iran following failed negotiations in Islamabad between the U.S. and Iran. ▪️ He suggested the U.S. could respond to Iran’s control over the Strait of Hormuz by imposing its own blockade. ▪️ The U.S. Navy could potentially assert control over maritime traffic in the strait, effectively restricting movement along this critical global oil route. ▪️ The proposal comes amid broader warnings from Trump after the collapse of talks, while Pakistan continues mediation efforts and urges both sides to maintain the ceasefire despite rising tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 👊 🇮🇷 在美国和伊朗在伊斯兰堡的谈判失败后，唐纳德·特朗普提议对伊朗实施海军封锁。▪️ 他建议美国可以通过实施自己的封锁来回应伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制。▪️ 美国海军可能主张对海峡内的海上交通进行控制，从而有效地限制这一关键全球石油航线上的移动。▪️ 该提议是在谈判破裂后特朗普发出更广泛警告的背景下提出的，而巴基斯坦继续进行调解努力，并敦促双方尽管霍尔木兹海峡周围紧张局势加剧，仍要维持停火。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Ministry of foreign affairs: “Türkiye will continue to stand by innocent civilians and will further its efforts to ensure that Netanyahu is held accountable for the crimes he has committed.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043221270137807058/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部：“土耳其将继续支持无辜平民，并将进一步努力确保内塔尼亚胡为其所犯下的罪行负责。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043221270137807058/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 According to the New York Post, the CIA used a cutting-edge technology called “Ghost Murmur” to locate and rescue a second U.S. pilot shot down in southern Iran. 🔹 The system is based on long-range quantum magnetometry, capable of detecting the electromagnetic signal of a human heartbeat. 🔹 The data is processed with AI to filter out background noise and isolate the target signal with high precision. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 据《纽约邮报》报道，中央情报局使用了一种名为“幽灵低语”（Ghost Murmur）的尖端技术，定位并营救了第二名在伊朗南部被击落的美国飞行员。🔹 该系统基于远程量子磁力测量技术，能够探测人类心跳的电磁信号。🔹 数据通过人工智能处理，以过滤背景噪音并高精度隔离目标信号。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国“要求过多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗浓缩铀的权利以及“其他问题”。国家电视台的报道称：“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和不合理要求阻碍了谈判的进展。”

text: OSINTtechnical Signs for the ill-fated US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan are already coming down. https://x.com/leventkemaI/status/2043181458311803206/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在巴基斯坦举行的注定失败的美伊和平谈判的标牌已经被拆除。https://x.com/leventkemaI/status/2043181458311803206/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Overnight in Russia’s Dagestan, the Chiryurt 330/110/10 kV substation suddenly caught fire. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043213456354975958/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯达吉斯坦一夜之间，Chiryurt 330/110/10 kV变电站突然起火。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043213456354975958/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利议会选举已经开始。推文

text: WarTranslated US Vice President JD Vance said talks lasting over 21 hours produced no deal. He said Iran wouldn’t accept US terms or budge on key demands, including its nuclear program. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043209330049126478/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 美国副总统JD·万斯表示，持续超过21小时的谈判没有达成任何协议。他说，伊朗不会接受美国的条款，也不会在关键要求（包括其核计划）上让步。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043209330049126478/video/1 推文

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：他们在这里究竟拒绝了什么？JD·万斯：我们需要看到他们做出肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求能够使他们迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：在美伊谈判失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们军队将每美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束了。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD·万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗人弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议——我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更坏的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在伊朗谈判于巴基斯坦破裂时，在佛罗里达州参加了一场UFC赛事。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方继续遵守停火协议。

text: Trump reposts after failed talks with Iran: The Trump card the president holds if Iran won’t bend: a naval blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普在与伊朗谈判失败后转发：如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中的王牌：海军封锁。

text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，由于战争持续数周后存在“不信任气氛”，因此对与美国达成协议不抱期望。“我们不应该期望在一次会议上就达成协议，”他说，并补充说，虽然找到了一些共同点，但“在两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧。”

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布，根据其联合战略防御协议，向东部地区的阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地部署约13,000名巴基斯坦士兵和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举动，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对一国的攻击将被视为对另一国的攻击。@wfwitness

text: After 21 hours of negotiations in Pakistan, JD Vance said the U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement. He said the U.S. made its terms clear, but Iran did not accept them.
text_zh: 在巴基斯坦进行了21小时的谈判后，JD·万斯表示美伊未能达成协议。他说美国明确了自己的条款，但伊朗没有接受。

text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 数十架美国加油机（KC-135和KC-46A）挤满本古里安机场

text: While the war may resume at any moment, it’s important to reiterate that the U.S. has no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure (terrorism). The world is now starting to feel the effects of the Hormuz blockade, but there’s still another card Iran hasn’t activated yet; the Bab al-Mandeb. Iran’s allies in Yemen (Ansarallah) have already demonstrated their ability to shut down the Bab al-Mandeb Strait from 2023 to 2025 in response to the Israeli genocide in Gaza, which both Biden and Trump attempted to reopen but failed, miserably.
text_zh: 虽然战争可能随时恢复，但必须重申，除了轰炸民用基础设施（恐怖主义）外，美国已无牌可打。世界现在开始感受到霍尔木兹封锁的影响，但伊朗还有一张牌尚未激活；曼德海峡。伊朗在也门的盟友（胡塞武装）已经在2023年至2025年期间证明了他们有能力关闭曼德海峡，以回应以色列在加沙的种族灭绝，拜登和特朗普都试图重新开放，但都惨败了。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump’s first social media post following failed peace talks with Iran is a link to an article suggesting a possible naval blockade on Iran if it does not comply with U.S. demands. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在与伊朗的和平谈判失败后的第一条社交媒体帖子是一个链接，文章暗示如果伊朗不遵守美国的要求，可能会对其进行海军封锁。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said it carried out a strike overnight on a Hezbollah rocket launcher in southern Lebanon that was loaded and ready to fire toward Israel. The launcher was identified in the Juwaya area and was destroyed in a rapid strike before it could be launched. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，昨晚对黎巴嫩南部的一个真主党火箭发射器进行了打击，该发射器已装弹并准备向以色列发射。发射器在朱瓦亚地区被发现，并在发射前被迅速摧毁。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump is sharing articles floating a US naval blockade of Iran, the "Venezuela playbook," after talks fail. Here's what that would actually look like. The idea is the US Navy takes control of the Strait of Hormuz and Kharg Island strangling Iran's economy while cutting China and India off from their key oil source simultaneously. The problem: Iran is not Venezuela. 🔸 The strait is only 33km wide at its narrowest point, every ship that enters is within range of Iran's entire coastal arsenal 🔸 Iran's Khalij Fars anti-ship ballistic missiles have a 300km range and are designed specifically to hit moving ships at sea 🔸 Noor and Qader cruise missiles, fired from mobile launchers hidden in coastal caves, cover the entire strait from the Iranian shoreline 🔸 Iran has an estimated 5,000-6,000 naval mines — including influence mines that sit on the seabed and are nearly impossible to detect 🔸 IRGC fast attack swarm boats are designed specifically to overwhelm US destroyers in confined waters — a classified DoD war game found the US lost 16 major warships including a carrier to Iranian swarm tactics 🔸 Iran controls three fortified island outposts (Larak, Qeshm and Abu Musa) sitting directly on the shipping lanes, each with underground bunkers and missile batteries Iran doesn't even need to win a naval battle, FPRI experts note Iran is running an "insurance blockade," it only needs to strike occasionally to make insurance uneconomical for commercial shipping. That alone shuts the strait down. Mine clearance in a contested environment takes a minimum of 4 weeks, and the US has decommissioned most of its dedicated minesweepers in CENTCOM. In 1991 it took 40 ships four months to clear Iraqi minefields in a permissive environment. Meanwhile the USS Gerald R. Ford, cited in the article as leading the blockade, is currently in Split, Croatia being repaired after Iranian strikes. The USS George H.W. Bush is en route as replacement. Trump may be out-blockaded before the blockade even starts. Source . 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普在谈判失败后分享了散布美国对伊朗进行海军封锁的文章，即“委内瑞拉剧本”。这就是它实际的样子。这个想法是美国海军控制霍尔木兹海峡和哈尔克岛，扼杀伊朗经济，同时切断中国和印度与其关键石油来源的联系。问题是：伊朗不是委内瑞拉。 🔸 海峡最窄处仅33公里宽，每艘进入的船只都在伊朗整个海岸武库的射程内 🔸 伊朗的“波斯湾”反舰弹道导弹射程为300公里，专门用于打击海上移动船只 🔸 从隐藏在海岸洞穴中的移动发射器发射的“努尔”和“卡德尔”巡航导弹覆盖了整个海峡 🔸 伊朗估计有5,000-6,000枚海军水雷——包括放置在海床上几乎无法探测的感应水雷 🔸 伊斯兰革命卫队快艇群专门设计用于在狭窄水域压制美国驱逐舰——一份机密的国防部战争游戏发现，美国在伊朗的蜂群战术中损失了16艘大型军舰，包括一艘航母 🔸 伊朗控制着三个直接位于航道上的加固岛屿前哨（拉拉克岛、格什姆岛和阿布穆萨岛），每个岛屿都有地下掩体和导弹连 伊朗甚至不需要赢得海战，外交政策研究所专家指出，伊朗正在进行“保险封锁”，它只需要偶尔进行打击，使商业航运的保险变得不经济。仅此一项就足以关闭海峡。在有争议的环境中进行扫雷至少需要4周时间，而美国已经退役了中央司令部大部分专门的扫雷舰。1991年，40艘船花了四个月时间才在许可的环境中清理了伊拉克的雷区。与此同时，文章中提到的领导封锁的“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号航空母舰目前正在克罗地亚斯普利特进行伊朗袭击后的维修。乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰正在途中作为替代。特朗普可能在封锁开始前就被反封锁了。来源。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational stance toward the European Union. Magyar, running as the main opposition challenger backed by the TISZA Party, has positioned himself as a reformist figure calling for institutional change and a tougher stance on corruption. Polling stations are set to close at 7 p.m. local time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利全国选举投票已经开始，总理维克托·欧尔班在执政16年后正面临挑战者彼得·马扎尔。欧尔班领导执政的青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对欧盟的对抗立场建立了他的平台。马扎尔作为由蒂萨党支持的主要反对派挑战者，将自己定位为呼吁体制变革和对腐败采取更强硬立场的改革派人物。投票站定于当地时间晚上7点关闭。@wfwitness
